Alert: DeploymentReplicasMismatch
Resource: medication-service
Environment: dev-tw
Cluster: H2S-EKS-DEV-STG-EAST-2
Severity: warning
Summary: Deployment has unavailable replicas

--- Structured Alert ---
AlertSource: prometheus
Environment: dev-tw

Status: firing
AlertName: DeploymentReplicasMismatch
ResourceType: deployment
ResourceName: medication-service
Namespace: dev
Summary: Deployment has unavailable replicas
Description: Deployment dev/medication-service has replica mismatch.
